title: cannotCalculateChanges is the correct response and should be defended
description: The old ChatContact/changes and Space/changes returned all current IDs as 'created' when state changed. That was a protocol lie — clients would cache duplicate entries on every sync cycle. The new cannotCalculateChanges response forces clients to do a full refresh (ChatContact/get with ids=null), which is correct per RFC 8620 §5.2. A future contributor might suggest reinstating the 'created' list as a convenience. Reject: that convenience is only correct for the first sync; subsequent syncs would accumulate duplicates.
close_reason: Design decision recorded in issue description; no code change needed
